subcodes.first_line: The Primal Point traced His course through the realm of Mystery until He found repose upon the Throne of Utterance, whereafter He fashioned the temples of the Abhá Letters [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نقطه عما سیر نمود تا در عرش نطق مستریح گشت و بعد هیاکل حروف ابها را بترکیب
subcodes.subjects: @the cloud ['ama], @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
